name: Arcane Odyssey x Warhammer40k
description:
NONE OF THESE ARE CONNECTED TO BOTH FRANCHISES. USER SHOULD OR MAY HAVE ATLEAST BASIC KNOWLEDGE ON BOTH GAMES/FRANCHISE. PURELY FICTIONAL.

This is also inspired by the Natlan war in Genshin Impact (more knowledge in Youtube 5.1 Archon Quest)

Story: Chaos, the pure evil in the eyes of the Imperium and the culture of the eyes of the Natives of the planet XXXXXX. The newly found planet was tainted with Chaos yet life bloomed there which was an anomaly that needed to be inspected by the Imperium.

This scemario only contains the Bronze sea for now due to Token error might occur, I even avoided adding some island in the west since they are not too important but you will still sea it being taken over in the distance.

Credits: Games Workshop (Warhammer 40k), Vetex Games (Arcane Odyssey in Roblox)
creator: Bluemarinboy
